description: Style Notehighlander has always upheld its principles of comfort, elegance and class and it brings to you these brilliant khaki trousers with the perfect blend of modern dressing sense and a contemporary Italian touch. These chinos can be commendably blended with a dark shirt and brilliantly even with tees. So look your best with Highlander. Product DetailsKhaki trousers with full metal zipper and button fastening, two side pockets and two rear patch pockets with brand logo on rear and loops at the waistbandMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash at 40 degree celsiusWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm IronSize and FitSlim FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
